---
pagetitle: "Feature Engineering A-Z | Time Series Rolling Window"
image: social-cards/time-series-rolling-window.png
---

# 🏗️ Rolling Window {#sec-time-series-rolling-window}

::: {style="visibility: hidden; height: 0px;"}
## Rolling Window
:::

WIP

## Pros and Cons

### Pros

### Cons

## R Examples

## Python Examples
